summary: Clear audience recording of a great show with nicely audible instrument separation
review: The audience (AUD) source captures the performance with surprising clarity—individual instruments can be heard distinctly, which is unusual for crowd recordings. Reviewers also note that the concert itself was a "great" show, though no specific musical moments are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic review praises both the sound quality (clear AUD with instrument separation) and the overall concert, suggesting a solid performance and an above‑average recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough to hear individual instruments; no major issues reported.
